potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall allow the user to select their role.
The system shall enable the user to sign in after choosing a role.
The system shall provide mentorship based on the review result.
The system shall provide funding based on the investment decision.
The system shall end the process once all actions are completed.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: A decision is then made on that idea.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall make a decision based on the submitted startup idea.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: In some cases, the process may also end directly after the decision.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall end the process if it ends directly after the decision is made.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall provide mentorship based on the review result.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not specify that the system provides mentorship; it only states a possible outcome of the decision.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall make an investment decision if the startup idea is presented to an investor.
hallucinations.reason: The source text mentions that the idea may be presented to an investor, but does not explicitly state that the system makes this decision.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall provide funding based on the investment decision.
hallucinations.reason: The source text only states that funding may be provided if the idea is presented to an investor and an investment decision is made, but does not guarantee it.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall make a decision based on the submitted startup idea.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement could be considered ambiguous as it does not specify what kind of decision is being made (e.g., mentorship, investment, etc.).
